# Stratezik — extended LLM index

> Toronto digital marketing agency. Canonical site: https://www.stratezik.com

## Core pages

- [Home](https://www.stratezik.com/): Digital marketing services, SEO, PPC, strategy, contact
- [Services hub](https://www.stratezik.com/services): All digital marketing services in Toronto and the GTA
- [Blog index](https://www.stratezik.com/blog): Articles on SEO, AEO, local search, paid media
- [Careers](https://www.stratezik.com/careers): Toronto team hiring

## Services (8)

Service areas: Toronto, Scarborough, and the Greater Toronto Area (GTA), Canada.

### Google Ads Management in Toronto
- URL: https://www.stratezik.com/services/paid-search
- Summary: Toronto Google Ads management from a founder who has run $10M+ in annual spend and holds a Google Search Honours Award. Disciplined paid search that compounds.
- Focus areas:
  - [Google Ads agency Toronto](https://www.stratezik.com/services/paid-search/google-ads): Toronto Google Ads management led by a founder who has run $10M+ in annual spend. Search, Performance Max, and Shopping campaigns with disciplined measurement.
  - [Microsoft Ads Toronto](https://www.stratezik.com/services/paid-search/microsoft-ads): Toronto Microsoft Ads (Bing) management. Often the cheapest qualified clicks available, frequently underused by GTA businesses, run by a $10M+ ad operator.

### Paid Social Ads Agency in Toronto
- URL: https://www.stratezik.com/services/paid-social
- Summary: Toronto paid social management across Meta, LinkedIn, TikTok, and Pinterest, built around real intent. Strong creative, honest measurement, scalable structure.
- Focus areas:
  - [Meta Ads agency Toronto](https://www.stratezik.com/services/paid-social/meta-ads): Toronto Meta Ads management (Facebook + Instagram). Pixel and CAPI set up right, A/B testing that means something, and retargeting that converts the warm audience.
  - [LinkedIn Ads agency Toronto](https://www.stratezik.com/services/paid-social/linkedin-ads): Toronto LinkedIn Ads management for B2B and high-deal-size services. Narrow targeting, strong creative, and ROI math that justifies the premium click costs.
  - [TikTok Ads Toronto](https://www.stratezik.com/services/paid-social/tiktok-ads): Toronto TikTok Ads management for businesses whose buyers actually live on the platform. Short-form creative direction, honest reach math, real test framework.

### SEO and AEO Agency in Toronto
- URL: https://www.stratezik.com/services/seo-aeo
- Summary: Toronto SEO and AEO services that rank you in Google and get you cited inside ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews. Position 50 to top 5 in four months.
- Focus areas:
  - [technical SEO Toronto](https://www.stratezik.com/services/seo-aeo/technical-seo): Toronto technical SEO audits and fixes: Core Web Vitals, schema markup, indexing, and the AI-crawler access most local sites are quietly blocking.
  - [local SEO Toronto](https://www.stratezik.com/services/seo-aeo/local-seo): Toronto local SEO: Google Maps rankings, neighbourhood-level relevance, and the structural work behind a position 50 to top 5 move in four months.
  - [answer engine optimization Toronto](https://www.stratezik.com/services/seo-aeo/answer-engine-optimization): Toronto AEO that gets your business cited inside ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews. AI search recommends 1.2% of local businesses, here's how to be one.

### Google Business Profile Management in Toronto
- URL: https://www.stratezik.com/services/google-business-profile
- Summary: Toronto Google Business Profile management that drives Maps rankings, calls, and direction requests. Real local result: position 50 to top 5 in four months.

### Social Media Marketing in Toronto
- URL: https://www.stratezik.com/services/social-media-marketing
- Summary: Toronto organic social media strategy and execution: LinkedIn and Facebook content calendars, post copy, scheduling, and community management for SMBs.

### Brand Strategy Agency in Toronto
- URL: https://www.stratezik.com/services/brand-strategy
- Summary: Toronto brand strategy services: positioning, messaging, and voice that beats the alternative. Led by a founder with 15+ years brand experience including GM time.

### Web Design in Toronto
- URL: https://www.stratezik.com/services/web-design
- Summary: Toronto web design and landing page builds in Webflow, Framer, or custom. SEO-ready, AODA compliant, fast, and built to convert from day one.
- Focus areas:
  - [landing page design Toronto](https://www.stratezik.com/services/web-design/landing-pages): Toronto landing page design and build. Single conversion-focused pages for paid campaigns and launches, in Webflow or Framer, AODA compliant, live in 2-3 weeks.
  - [small business website design Toronto](https://www.stratezik.com/services/web-design/website-design): Toronto small business website design and build. Webflow, Framer, or custom. SEO-ready, AODA compliant, conversion-focused, live in 6 to 10 weeks.

### AI Agent Development in Toronto
- URL: https://www.stratezik.com/services/ai-agents
- Summary: Stratezik runs on a five-agent organisation that researches, writes, reviews, and ships marketing work every day. Meet the team, see the handoffs, and look at what it produces.
- Focus areas:
  - [AI strategy consulting Toronto](https://www.stratezik.com/services/ai-agents/ai-strategy): Toronto AI strategy consulting for founders deciding what to automate first. Agent org design, context engineering, and a deployment roadmap from operators.
  - [custom AI agent development Toronto](https://www.stratezik.com/services/ai-agents/agent-development): Toronto custom AI agent build and deployment. End-to-end work from context engineering and tool integration to handoff, by an agency that runs on its own agents.
